title: Compaction Strategies
learningObjectives: Distinguish compression from compaction and explain why they must be optimized jointly.
Quantify the parameter budget of a full 3DGS representation (59 params × 4 bytes) and identify which attributes dominate.
Compare SH degree reduction, quaternion reparameterization, and 2D Gaussians as attribute-reduction strategies.
Contrast standard ADC (clone/split/prune) with improved methods like PixelGS, MCMC, and SUNDAE.
Explain ScaffoldGS anchors and how HAC/HAC++ exploits spatial correlations for further compression.

readings.title: Compaction vs. Compression and Attribute Reduction
Structural Modifications: Anchors, LOD, and Improved Rendering

lab.title: Compaction Pipeline: SH Reduction, Pruning, and Size Analysis
